rationale: Both correctly diagnose PR #4527's (None, payload) regression fixed by PR #4792 and folded into the vLLM 0.24 rebase commit a560ed18, matching the thread. X's quoted code comment is a near-verbatim match to the ground-truth snippet, giving it stronger objective grounding, and its 'closed as conflicting, cherry-picked into rebase' framing better explains akshatvishu's 'for some reason' remark than Y's flatter 'which is merged' claim. Y is more complete (addresses the reporter's exact log lines, flags red herrings, gives reopen criteria) but its extra file/line citations (scheduler coordinator, timeout mixin) are unverifiable embellishment beyond what the ground truth confirms. X's stray 'skill candidates' footer is irrelevant noise but doesn't undermine the core answer.
